title: wrkout
description: Workout tracker for logging Push, Pull, and Legs sessions with less friction and better consistency.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: Interactive roadmap that helps learners decide what to study next, track progress, and stay consistent with DSA.

title: J-Void
description: Java practice platform designed to build confidence through focused, hands-on problem solving.

title: WealthWise
description: Financial planning platform that turns important money decisions into clear guidance and simple interactive tools.

title: SpringMart
description: Spring Boot commerce demo backend with CRUD APIs, search, pagination, validation, partial updates, seeded data, image handling, H2 persistence, and Docker support, paired with an AI-assisted frontend that I integrated manually.

title: Student Management System
description: Java and MySQL administration tool for small-school and demo use, with layered design, validated CRUD workflows, persistent storage, search by ID, name, or grade, and SQL-based reporting for summaries, grade distribution, age ranges, and top performers.
